name: seo-intelligence
description: AI-powered SEO toolkit: audit pages, analyze competitors, generate ranking plans, build schema markup, cluster keywords, and track AI search visibility. 20+ years of SEO expertise in every analysis.

SERPAPI_KEY.description: SerpAPI key for live Google SERP data (free tier: 100 searches/month). Get yours at https://serpapi.com

PERPLEXITY_API_KEY.description: Perplexity API key for AEO visibility tracking (optional)

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: OpenAI API key for ChatGPT AEO analysis (optional)

GOOGLE_CLOUD_API_KEY.description: Google Cloud API key for Knowledge Graph entity analysis (optional)
